metadata.description: Information Logistics skill plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude-pip
plugins.description: Performance Improvement Plan for Claude. Type CLAUDE PIP to lock in a behavioral discipline (TDD, plan mode, sub-agents, adversarial review) as a deterministic rule in the project's CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: tufte-love
plugins.description: Tufte-style audits, redesigns, and reviews for data visualizations, dashboards, and quantitative UI.

plugins.name: jtbd-prd
plugins.description: Validate customer need before you build. Produces a Job Article that functions as PRD framing, grounded in Jobs-to-be-Done evidence.
